chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 65 – The Indication and the wordings upon Amir Al Momineen<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/287)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/287)
text: عَلَّمَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلِيّاً ( صلوات الله عليه ) أَلْفَ حَرْفٍ كُلُّ حَرْفٍ يَفْتَحُ أَلْفَ حَرْفٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Mansour Bin Yunus, from Abu Bakr Al Hazaramy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> taught Ali<sup>asws</sup> a thousand letters, each letter opening a thousand letters’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Muhammad ibn Isma’il from Mansur ibn Yunus from abu Bakr al-Hadrami from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “the Messenger of Allah made Ali (a.s.) learn a thousand letters of which each one opens a thousand letters.”
